name: owasp-agentic-mcp
description: OWASP Top 10 for AI Agents security assessment tools. Capabilities: full agent security scan, prompt injection detection, tool poisoning check, excessive agency, data leakage. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: assess_agent_security
tools.description: Full OWASP Agentic AI Top 10 security assessment

tools.name: check_prompt_injection
tools.description: Check text for prompt injection attack patterns

tools.name: check_tool_poisoning
tools.description: Check a tool for name/description manipulation

tools.name: check_excessive_agency
tools.description: Assess agent for excessive permissions (least privilege)
